result.summary: Found a couple of layout issues on the page: some content is clipped off the right edge, and the fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid.

issues.description: The game rows in both sections are cut off on the right side, leaving the third card partially visible instead of fully fitting within the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid/card widths or enable proper horizontal scrolling so cards are fully visible and accessible.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar is overlapping the lower game content, obscuring parts of the last visible row.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding/margin to the content area or reposition the fixed nav so it does not cover interactive content.

issues.description: The top category chip row is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Allow the chip row to scroll horizontally or reduce chip widths so the full label is shown.
